text: Created ticket Cover runtime behavior with tests

Added six focused package tests covering store durability, command flows, tool flows, runtime spawn behavior, prompt guidance, and extension registration. Verified with `npx vitest run packages/pi-ralph/__tests__/commands.test.ts packages/pi-ralph/__tests__/index.test.ts packages/pi-ralph/__tests__/prompt-guidance.test.ts packages/pi-ralph/__tests__/runtime.test.ts packages/pi-ralph/__tests__/store.test.ts packages/pi-ralph/__tests__/tools.test.ts`, targeted Biome checks, and workspace `npm run typecheck`.

`packages/pi-ralph/__tests__/store.test.ts` and `commands.test.ts` now cover manual-approval gating, blocked prepareLaunch behavior, and cancellation rollback so the reviewed edge cases remain enforced by tests.
